summary: Wired Meeting 1 Fact Finder form to persist data to sales.sales_factfinder via the data layer. Created Zod types (data/types), query functions (data/queries), orchestration service (app/meetings/meeting1), and updated Meeting1.tsx to call the service on save and hydrate from existing data on mount. Only the 4 declared columns (employer_name, employee_count, renewal_month, prior_broker) are persisted per the work packet scope.

imo_layer_verification.ingress: Meeting1.tsx — Zod safeParse validates form input before passing to Middle layer
imo_layer_verification.middle: src/app/meetings/meeting1/service.ts — orchestrates mint → upsert → error logging
imo_layer_verification.egress: Toast notification to UI on success/failure — no external egress

ctb_branch_compliance.data_types: src/data/types/factfinder.ts — Zod schemas for all factfinder tables
ctb_branch_compliance.data_queries: src/data/queries/factfinder.ts — all Supabase access isolated here

payload.deferred_fields_note: ~26 additional form fields not persisted — requires column_registry.yml expansion + separate work packet
